TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == ngta == ngta ga baq mebazing. bazing ga pinbazing na yaya ngta.sraral bnkis taga zngta qu spngun nha pptuliq. ngta ga blaq balay niqun hi nya.qmawx lpyung ga yasa spqaniq ta lpyung. pgluw sa hi' na ngta tmahuk qu topu' ga, sbing balay ayang nya'.
S.PHON: == ŋta == ŋta ɣa βaq meβaziŋ. βaziŋ ɣa pinβaziŋ na jaja ŋta.s~ɕraral βnkis~ɕ taɣa zŋta qu s~ɕpŋun nħa pptuliq. ŋta ɣa βlaq βalaj niqun ħi nja.qmawx lpjuŋ ɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕpqaniq ta lpjuŋ. pɣluw s~ɕa ħiʔ na ŋta tmaħuk qu topuʔ ɣa, s~ɕβiŋ βalaj ajaŋ njaʔ.
S.FORM: == ngta == ngta ga baq mebazing. bazing ga pinbazing na yaya ngta.sraral bnkis taga zngta qu spngun nha pptuliq. ngta ga blaq balay niqun hi nya.qmawx lpyung ga yasa spqaniq ta lpyung. pgluw sa hi' na ngta tmahuk qu topu' ga, sbing balay ayang nya'.
S.PHON: == ŋta == ŋta ɣa βaq meβaziŋ. βaziŋ ɣa pinβaziŋ na jaja ŋta.s~ɕraral βnkis~ɕ taɣa zŋta qu s~ɕpŋun nħa pptuliq. ŋta ɣa βlaq βalaj niqun ħi nja.qmawx lpjuŋ ɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕpqaniq ta lpjuŋ. pɣluw s~ɕa ħiʔ na ŋta tmaħuk qu topuʔ ɣa, s~ɕβiŋ βalaj ajaŋ njaʔ.
